Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Horizon General Contractor to get the job done right.

“Horizon transformed our 1960s Sugar House kitchen into a modern masterpiece while keeping the mid-century charm we love. They suggested local quartzite counters that handle our busy family and Utah's temperature swings beautifully. The team was respectful of our home and finished two days ahead of schedule.”

Megan T. Kitchen Remodeling
Mar 15, 2025

“We needed more space for our growing family but didn't want to leave our Avenues neighborhood. Horizon designed a second-story addition that looks like it's always been part of our 1920s bungalow. They navigated historic district approvals seamlessly and reinforced the foundation for earthquake safety - crucial in our area.”

James K. Home Addition
Feb 28, 2025

“After years of hard water stains in our Draper home, we finally have a bathroom that stands up to Utah's water quality. Horizon installed a whole-house water softener and chose materials that resist mineral buildup. The heated floors make winter mornings bearable, and the shower's ventilation keeps moisture under control.”

Sarah L. Bathroom Remodeling
Jan 10, 2025

“The team at Horizon replaced our crumbling siding with fiber cement that looks like wood but handles Salt Lake's weather much better. They repaired our roof's ice dam damage properly and installed oversized gutters for spring runoff. Our Capitol Hill home looks better than ever and is finally protected from the elements.”

David P. Exterior Remodeling
Nov 22, 2024

“Our Sandy basement was a damp storage space until Horizon transformed it into a cozy family room. They addressed moisture issues we didn't even know we had and installed a radon mitigation system for safety. The space stays perfectly dry even during heavy spring rains, and the built-in shelving makes great use of awkward angles.”

Rachel M. Basement Finishing
Oct 5, 2024

“Our new Horizon-built deck is the perfect spot for summer evenings with views of the Wasatch Mountains. They designed it to handle heavy snow loads in winter and built in shade structures for hot summer days. The composite material still looks new after a full year with zero maintenance - exactly what we wanted for our busy Provo household.”

Thomas R. Deck Construction
Sep 18, 2024
Horizon General Contractor

Trusted general contractor professionals serving Salt Lake City, UT and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
